type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
-	Replacement of Wax Kettle in Recovery –  March 2021
-	Repair of Foots Kettle  in Recovery – March 2021 to Sept 2021 (running on Spare) – Sept 2021, repair complete, running with Foots Kettle
-	Cleaned Recovery Heat Exchangers – Sept 2020 and June 2021 and Oct 2021  (prior to Sept 2020, last cleaning was July 2019)

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment:
-	Replacement of Wax Kettle in Recovery –  March 2021
-	Repair of Foots Kettle  in Recovery – March 2021 to Sept 2021 (running on Spare) – Sept 2021, repair complete, running with Foots Kettle
-	Cleaned Recovery Heat Exchangers – Sept 2020 and June 2021 and Oct 2021  (prior to Sept 2020, last cleaning was July 2019)
All these action resulted in better solvent recovery from the process and less consumption.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
-	Replacement of Wax Kettle in Recovery –  March 2021
-	Repair of Foots Kettle  in Recovery – March 2021 to Sept 2021 (running on Spare) – Sept 2021, repair complete, running with Foots Kettle
-	Cleaned Recovery Heat Exchangers – Sept 2020 and June 2021 and Oct 2021  (prior to Sept 2020, last cleaning was July 2019)
All these action resulted in better solvent recovery from the process and less consumption.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Reduced consumption of MEK and toluene
-	 Removing the stripper packing from the stripper condenser
-	Taking the Foots Kettle offline for repairs. When the Foots Kettle was put back online solvent consumption went up. We took it offline again and consumption dropped again. The Spare Kettle performs better than the Wax Kettle and the Foots Kettle
-	Cleaning of the exchangers
